purpose: Apply explicit, reviewable corrections where a versioned base-registry record has become stale relative to an installed public-safe page and confirmed source boundary.

overrides.reason: The base registry still says intake and pending detail page, while the installed page records the canonical source repository, source_available state, initial public-safe canonical detail page, publication family, source boundary, and pending source-confirmed proof and validation extraction.
overrides.effective_purpose: Mirror public-safe metadata for the GCAT-BCAT formalism family and connect governance-centered and boundary-centered testing, authority class, policy reference, evidence posture, review posture, commit-time validity, receipts, publication artifacts, and external crosswalk targets without treating the wiki or Publisher as canonical source authority.
overrides.effective_transition_relationship: initial public-safe canonical detail page and source boundary installed; publication inventory connected; mathematical, proof, validation, and reference-implementation extraction remain pending source confirmation
overrides.authority_boundary: This override corrects mirror metadata only. It does not make the wiki or Publisher the formalism source, prove GCAT-BCAT, validate the formalism, grant execution authority, or create admissibility standing.

next_action: Use the effective registry state for completeness and publication audits while preserving the v0.1 base record as historical provenance.
